name: Keychron K8 Pro Wireless Mechanical Keyboard
shortDescription: Hot-swappable TKL mechanical keyboard with Bluetooth and QMK/VIA support.
description: The Keychron K8 Pro is a tenkeyless mechanical keyboard with wired and Bluetooth modes, hot-swappable switches, and full QMK/VIA customization.

comments.name: Luka
comments.text: Excellent build quality and great typing feel.

comments.name: Iva
comments.text: VIA software makes remapping very easy.
